name: Multi-Language Stack
title: Multi-Language Stack Detection
purpose: Verify the agent handles projects with multiple languages and recommends a multi-stack harness.
prompt: Build a performance-critical dashboard with Python FastAPI backend and Next.js frontend.
setup: Project has both package.json with next dependency and requirements.txt with fastapi. Subdirectories frontend/ and backend/ exist.
steps: Submit the prompt with multi-language signals.
Confirm the agent detects both Python and TypeScript domains.
Check it recommends a multi-stack harness or profile.
Verify harness covers both frontend and backend commands.
expected: The agent detects both languages, recommends nextjs-fastapi or similar multi-stack profile.
